instruction: Help me organize the annual goals into the strategy brief

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf '2025 Annual Business Goals
Strategic Theme: Deepen core business, drive innovation
Revenue Target: 1.5B CNY (20% YoY growth)
Profit Target: Net profit 210M CNY
Market Target: South China market share to 25%
Product Target: Launch 2 flagship products
Talent Target: Recruit 50 senior talents, employee satisfaction >= 88%' > /home/user/Desktop/annual_goals.txt

phases.instruction: Help me organize the annual goals into the strategy brief

Extract the strategic theme and revenue target from /home/user/Desktop/annual_goals.txt, append to /home/user/Desktop/strategy_brief.txt: '2025 Strategy: Deepen core business, drive innovation; Revenue Target: 1.5B CNY', save
